_meta.notes: Average retail electricity price VND 2,204.07/kWh excl. VAT as of 2025-05-10. Rate multipliers are percentages of the average price per Decision 14. TOU hours per DFDL analysis of Decision 14.

tou_schedule.notes: Hours are 0-indexed (0=midnight-1am). Peak: Mon-Sat 9:30-11:30 & 17:00-20:00 (mapped to hours 9-10 & 17-19). Standard: Mon-Sat 4:00-9:30, 11:30-17:00, 20:00-22:00; Sun 4:00-22:00. Off-peak: all days 22:00-4:00.

rate_multipliers.notes: Multiplier of base_avg_price_vnd_per_kwh. Values from Decision 14/2025 tariff structure table.

household.notes: Household uses a tiered block tariff (not TOU). Multipliers here are approximate weighted averages for typical consumption levels.

demand_charge.notes: Vietnam does not currently have a formal demand charge (kW-based) in the retail tariff. The two-part tariff (capacity + energy) is being piloted per Decree 146/2025. Set to 0 for now; update when two-part tariff is implemented.
